feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.content: oh boy.. I sure am excited to get into my wageslave job and deal with my retarded faggot passive aggressive coworkers who you have to mitigate for a pittance. It's so fun being trapped in a confined space for hours on end with people who all hate each other and start high school tier gossip and bitch about their fat whore wives because they're lifeless losers with nothing better to do. There really is nothing quite like forcing a smile on my face having to speak to these subhumans who will inevi

entry.title: /b/ Random: Someone tried doxxing me over a week ago, and they have not seemed to have given…
entry.content: Someone tried doxxing me over a week ago, and they have not seemed to have given up. I did a little investigating on my own and found their friends address, but I have hit a roadblock. I checked cracked.st and there does not seem to be such services offered. (Obligatory in Minecraft) does anyone know where such services are offered? I would be willing to pay quite well to put this to rest. My session is attached below and you may leave any preferred communication in this thread. 05ef691a7fef209a

entry.content: Most guys cannot fathom what its like to be a woman in 2026 Its hilarious, but its also kinda sad. Let's imagine one single day in the average woman's life. Her day commences in the haze of whatever free drugs and booze she imbibed, boofed and snorted the previous day. She can barely make out all the notifications from thirsty dudes literally from all over the world. There's a vast underclass of swarthy men stretching from here to bumfuck Bangladesh who like, comment and follow a girl like this,

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Home Folder
entry.content: How do you organize your home folder? Do you just use the defaults given by whatever you use, or do you set it up yourself? The one kinda different thing I do is put all the programming stuff I'm actively working on in a folder called "prog", and all the program files for downloaded/completed programs I use in a folder called "gram"

entry.content: The Olympian was visiting what has become poster child for trump's corruption and incompetence. https://www.washingtonpost.com/nati on/2026/06/20/cyclist-arrested-refl ecting-pool-denies-trump-vandalism- claims/ David Hearn had just finished a loop around Hains Point on Friday as part of a 52-mile bike ride when he swung by the Lincoln Memorial to see the refurbished Reflecting Pool for himself. entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: GloryBot - Discord gloryhole bot
entry.content: GloryBot is an anonymous chatbot that quietly pairs you up with another member for a private one-on-one conversation, and neither of you ever sees who the other is. You talk through the bot's DMs and it carries your messages back and forth. https://discord.gg/3B2DR9hEKh

entry.title: /o/ Auto: We had no idea how good we had it even just 10-15 years ago. Something like picr…
entry.content: We had no idea how good we had it even just 10-15 years ago. Something like picrel would have only been a few thousand and parts were literally everywhere. Has anyone else been nearly priced out of this hobby? It's not even fun anymore.

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /flg/ - F-List General #8390 Atmosphere Edition Previous Thread: >>83567945 F-li…
entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8390 Atmosphere Edition Previous Thread: >>83567945 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise their profile

You do make enough to afford a monthly netflix subscription right?" >*bwaaaaah* >she wanders into the living room and sees the tv. entry.title: /g/ Technology: Kde 6.7 yall. Isn’t it glorious? Fucking Linux devs need to be strung up and cru…
entry.content: Kde 6.7 yall. Isn’t it glorious? Fucking Linux devs need to be strung up and crucified roman style for being so fucking retarded. How can you be this bad at coding? The scourging of Jesus is too weak of a punishment. It’s on purpose at this point. By the way the system works perfectly. It’s a 9070xt and works perfectly fine on 6.6.5. There’s no excuse for it to be this fucking terrible.

entry.content: >"Big Feline Milfs" Edition /ACT/ is a weekly Caturday thread dedicated to cats and other felines. Calling all artists and writers: Feel free to post your art, stories, and WIPs! Whether it's just doodles, smut art, or full-blown anthro stories/greentexts, all are welcome to share and critique. Let the Caturday festivities begin! Drop your favorite cat pics, comics, and game recs below! >Alpha Lexa Greens: https://drive.google.com/drive/u/0/ folders/1Og2_VSZpZntiOqNK85_ANkFME- f77LsF?sort=13&dir

entry.title: /mu/ Music: 90s indie that isn't completely retarded & embarrassing unlike ween, pavement, d…
entry.content: 90s indie that isn't completely retarded & embarrassing unlike ween, pavement, dinosaur jr etc? i havent heard alot of rock post prog and i want to expand my taste. ive heard some stuff i want to hear more of but 95 percent of the albums ive sampled have this snarky slacker shtick thats unbearable. doesn't have to be super obscure, i haven't heard a ton of it.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Any Britfags here? It's a shame you guys don't appreciate them more. It's a quin…
entry.content: Any Britfags here? It's a shame you guys don't appreciate them more. It's a quintessential British band and it should be treasured by you, not pushed into obscurity. It's beyond me how Stones, The Who or even Oasis are more recognised at your place than a band that is basicallt a Platonic ideal of a british rock band . At least Ray is a Sir.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Just curious How viligant are the people managing ai like grok with illegal stuf…
entry.content: Just curious How viligant are the people managing ai like grok with illegal stuff? Like if you say you are a drug dealer nothing will happen probably. But if you post cocaine and explain that its your cocaine that you sell to people you will possibly get copped on? Are there any stories with this? I know chatgpt stopped a kid from committing suicide and suicide is a crime so they’re allowed to report that but im talking about drugs specifically.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: To the people still complaining about the lack of Adobe products on Linux: Your …
entry.content: To the people still complaining about the lack of Adobe products on Linux: Your use case is a niche, and after 20 years of listening to your drivel I'm tired of pretending it's not. Very few people are professionally involved in media creation to a degree where they absolutely *must* use these programs. Everyone else can get by with simpler alternatives, on the off chance they end up having to do so at all.

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: "Ehh? You want a girlfriend? Really? That's so boyish!" "Yeah... I've been wanti…
entry.content: "Ehh? You want a girlfriend? Really? That's so boyish!" "Yeah... I've been wanting one for a while. It's been lonely." "What kind of girl do you like, anon-kun?" "Well... I think I like transgender girls best. In all honesty, I'd love a trans girlfriend." "NANI? A transgender girlfriend? Why not a real girl, like..." "Well, trans girls are just a lot prettier, I think. And they're smarter, too. But I'm mostly obsessed with their divine beauty."

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Navigating service manuals?
entry.content: I found a 2014 Subaru Outback service manual here: >https://sl-i.net/FORUM/showthread. php?18087-Subaru-Factory-Service-Ma nuals-(FSM)-Every-Model-USDM-EU It is 6314 pages! Even if you wanted to do the right thing and find torque specs and the proper procedure to do a task it would take hours to find the right section to just do one simple job like find the brake bleed order. How do people cope with the insane size of the service manuals that make finding info so difficult? I guess by ignoring t
